def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) for per-code delay operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    close = pl.col('close')

    # Delay terms
    delay20 = delay(close, periods=20)
    delay10 = delay(close, periods=10)
    delay1 = delay(close, periods=1)

    # Component A: average change from t-20 to t-10
    A = (delay20 - delay10) / 10
    # Component B: average change from t-10 to t
    B = (delay10 - close) / 10
    # Difference of average slopes
    D = A - B

    # Conditional logic per stock
    factor = pl.when(D > 0.25).then(-1).otherwise(
        pl.when(D < 0).then(1).otherwise(
            -1 * (close - delay1)
        )
    )

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
